projectDescription: An efficient and flexible Observable-based web scraper for Node.js that respects robots.txt, handles sitemaps, and emits crawled pages as an RxJS stream.
keyFeatures: Observable-based API built on RxJS — subscribe to crawled pages as a stream
Automatic robots.txt parsing and enforcement of Disallow rules
Configurable Axios HTTP client with retry logic and exponential backoff
Batched concurrent page fetching (4 pages per batch)
Custom htmlparser2 callbacks for attribute, text, and element events
Deduplication — each URL is visited only once per scrape session
publicApiSurface: new Spinney(site: string, options?: Options, config?: AxiosRequestConfig)
spinney.subscribe({ next, error, complete, ontext, onattribute }): Subscription
